mapper.sql: SELECT b.*, COALESCE(ds_stat.dataset_count, 0) AS dataset_count, COALESCE(ds_stat.dataset_names, '') AS dataset_names FROM ai_report_data_business_definition b LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bd.tenant_id, bd.business_id, COUNT(ds.id) AS dataset_count, GROUP_CONCAT(ds.dataset_name ORDER BY bd.is_primary DESC, bd.sort ASC, bd.id ASC SEPARATOR '、') AS dataset_names FROM ai_report_data_business_dataset bd LEFT JOIN ai_report_data_dataset ds ON ds.tenant_id = bd.tenant_id AND ds.id = bd.dataset_id AND ds.del_flag = '0' WHERE bd.tenant_id = #{tenantId} GROUP BY bd.tenant_id, bd.business_id ) ds_stat ON ds_stat.tenant_id = b.tenant_id AND ds_stat.business_id = b.id
